THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_STRIKE.title: Strike
THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_DEFEND.title: Defend
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.title: Plan
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
Choose up to {Select:diff()} cards in your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED.title: Just as Planned
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED.descriptio: Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-NEW_PERSPECTIVE.title: New Perspective
THEAPPRENTICE-NEW_PERSPECTIVE.descriptio: Discard all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand. Draw 1 per card discarded.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.title: Contemplate
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.selectionPromp: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.title: Realize
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.title: Epiphany
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.description:
#Draw {Cards:diff()} -card-+cards+.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-GROOVE.title: Groove
THEAPPRENTICE-IMPROVISE.title: Improvise
THEAPPRENTICE-IMPROVISE.description: Remove [gold]Planned[/gold] from all cards in your hand. Draw 1 card for each.
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK.title: Creative Block
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have no [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Block:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL.title: Rehearsal
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL.description:
#+Draw 2 cards.+
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to all cards in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CLEAR_MIND.title: Clear Mind
THEAPPRENTICE-CLEAR_MIND.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each.
THEAPPRENTICE-TABULA_RASA.title: Tabula Rasa
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.title: Transpose
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.description:
#Select 2 cards. Transfer [gold]Planned[/gold] from one to the other.+
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.+
THEAPPRENTICE-SIGNATURE.title: Signature
THEAPPRENTICE-PRELUDE.title: Prelude
THEAPPRENTICE-SCHEMING.title: Scheming
THEAPPRENTICE-SCHEMING.description: At the start of your turn, choose a card in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCHEMING.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE.title: In the Zone
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE.description: At the start of each turn, if you have [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Energy:energyIcons}.
THEAPPRENTICE-OBSESSION.title: Obsession
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE.title: Encore
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE.description: Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards. They keep their [gold]Planned[/gold] status.
THEAPPRENTICE-VIRTUOSO.title: Virtuoso
THEAPPRENTICE-VIRTUOSO.description: #At the -end-+[i]start[/i]+ of your turn, remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all cards in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.title: Magnum Opus
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.description: #Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to up to -3-+4+ cards from your draw pile.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.selectionPromp: Choose cards from your draw pile to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-PREFACE.title: Preface
THEAPPRENTICE-LEITMOTIF.title: Leitmotif
THEAPPRENTICE-LEITMOTIF.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your discard pile.
THEAPPRENTICE-LEITMOTIF.selectionPrompt: Choose a card in your discard pile to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-DRAFT.title: Draft
THEAPPRENTICE-DRAFT.description: #Draw -1 card-+2 cards+. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to the drawn -card-+cards+.
THEAPPRENTICE-FORESIGHT.title: Foresight
THEAPPRENTICE-FORESIGHT.description:
#Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your draw pile.
Draw -1 card-+2 cards+.
THEAPPRENTICE-FORESIGHT.selectionPrompt: Choose a card in your draw pile to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTURE.title: Overture
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTURE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAESTRO.title: Maestro
THEAPPRENTICE-MAESTRO.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card, draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAM.title: Dream
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITION.title: Ambition
THEAPPRENTICE-POTENTIAL.title: Potential
THEAPPRENTICE-NOCTURNE.title: Nocturne
THEAPPRENTICE-HUBRIS.title: Hubris
THEAPPRENTICE-HUBRIS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 2 [gold]Ambitions[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-LONGING.title: Longing
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVE.title: Drive
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 3 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Ambition+[/gold]|[gold]Ambitions[/gold]} to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-REVERIE.title: Reverie
THEAPPRENTICE-REVERIE.description:
Add 3 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Dreams+[/gold]|[gold]Dreams[/gold]} to your hand.
Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-SUBLIMATION.title: Sublimation
THEAPPRENTICE-SUBLIMATION.description: Exhaust all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand. For each, add 1 {AmbitionType}.
THEAPPRENTICE-PASTICHE.title: Pastiche
THEAPPRENTICE-PASTICHE.description: Transform 1 card in your hand into a [gold]Potential+[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-PASTICHE.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to transform into Potential+.
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVEN_INSPIRATION.title: Driven Inspiration
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVEN_INSPIRATION.descrip:
Add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Dream+[/gold]|[gold]Dream[/gold]} and 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Ambition+[/gold]|[gold]Ambition[/gold]} to your hand.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVEN_INSPIRATION.selecti: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-LULLABY.title: Lullaby
THEAPPRENTICE-LULLABY.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Dream+[/gold]|[gold]Dream[/gold]} to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONVICTION.title: Conviction
THEAPPRENTICE-CONVICTION.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Ambition+[/gold]|[gold]Ambition[/gold]} to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-MANIFESTO.title: Manifesto
THEAPPRENTICE-MANIFESTO.description:
Add 4 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Ambition+[/gold]|[gold]Ambitions[/gold]} to your hand
Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-LUCIDITY.title: Lucidity
THEAPPRENTICE-LUCIDITY.description:
#Add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] to your hand.
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all [gold]Dreams[/gold] in your hand.+
Upgrade all [gold]Dreams[/gold] in your hand.+
THEAPPRENTICE-RESOLVE.title: Resolve
THEAPPRENTICE-RESOLVE.description:
#Add 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold] to your hand.
Remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand.+
Upgrade all [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand.+
THEAPPRENTICE-IGNITION.title: Ignition
THEAPPRENTICE-CHRYSALIS.title: Chrysalis
THEAPPRENTICE-CHRYSALIS.description: Exhaust all [gold]Dreams[/gold] and [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand. For each, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Potential+[/gold]|[gold]Potential[/gold]} to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DAYDREAM.title: Daydream
THEAPPRENTICE-DAYDREAM.description: Add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Dream+[/gold]|[gold]Dream[/gold]} to your hand for each card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-WUNDERKIND.title: Wunderkind
THEAPPRENTICE-WUNDERKIND.description: At the start of your turn, if you have no [gold]Dreams[/gold] or [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand, add 1 [gold]Dream+[/gold] and 1 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-PRODIGY.title: Prodigy
THEAPPRENTICE-PRODIGY.description:
When you play a [gold]Dream[/gold], add 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold] to your discard pile.
When you play an [gold]Ambition[/gold], add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] to your discard pile.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONDUCTOR.title: Conductor
THEAPPRENTICE-CONDUCTOR.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Potential+[/gold]|[gold]Potential[/gold]} to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-BLUEPRINT.title: Blueprint
THEAPPRENTICE-BLUEPRINT.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand. For each, add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] and 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold] to your draw pile.
THEAPPRENTICE-SOLACE.title: Solace
THEAPPRENTICE-CHORUS.title: Chorus
THEAPPRENTICE-CHORUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Add 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-WISHFUL.title: Wishful
THEAPPRENTICE-WISHFUL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-PASSION.title: Passion
THEAPPRENTICE-PASSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Add 2 [gold]Dreams[/gold] and 2 [gold]Ambitions[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo
THEAPPRENTICE-CRESCENDO.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Dreams[/gold] and [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each.
THEAPPRENTICE-DESTINED.title: Destined
THEAPPRENTICE-DESTINED.description: #Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to all [gold]Dreams[/gold] and [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-FLOURISH.title: Flourish
THEAPPRENTICE-RESTRAINED_STRIKE.title: Restrained Strike
THEAPPRENTICE-RESTRAINED_STRIKE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] to yourself.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to this card.
THEAPPRENTICE-ACHING_WISH.title: Aching Wish
THEAPPRENTICE-ACHING_WISH.description:
#Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to yourself.
Add -3-+4+ [gold]Dreams[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DESIRE.title: Desire
THEAPPRENTICE-DESIRE.description: Whenever you gain a debuff, add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSCENDENCE.title: Transcendence
THEAPPRENTICE-PROPHECY.title: Prophecy
THEAPPRENTICE-PROPHECY.description: For each type of debuff you have, add 1 {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Dream+[/gold]|[gold]Dream[/gold]} with [gold]Planned[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-LAMENT.title: Lament
THEAPPRENTICE-CANTICLE.title: Canticle
THEAPPRENTICE-OUTCRY.title: Outcry
THEAPPRENTICE-CONFESSION.title: Confession
THEAPPRENTICE-CONFESSION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] to yourself.
THEAPPRENTICE-REPOSE.title: Repose
THEAPPRENTICE-CANDOR.title: Candor
THEAPPRENTICE-CANDOR.description:
Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to yourself.
THEAPPRENTICE-INVERSION.title: Inversion
THEAPPRENTICE-INVERSION.description:
Convert up to 5 [gold]Weak[/gold] to [gold]Unweak[/gold].
Convert up to 5 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to [gold]Unvulnerable[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-EXERTION.title: Exertion
THEAPPRENTICE-STRAIN.title: Strain
THEAPPRENTICE-WALLOW.title: Wallow
THEAPPRENTICE-COMPOSE.title: Compose
THEAPPRENTICE-SURRENDER.title: Surrender
THEAPPRENTICE-REVERSAL.title: Reversal
THEAPPRENTICE-BREAKTHROUGH.title: Breakthrough
THEAPPRENTICE-DISSOLUTION.title: Dissolution
THEAPPRENTICE-DISSOLUTION.description: #Remove all [gold]Tension[/gold]. Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies for each -5-+3+ [gold]Tension[/gold] removed.
THEAPPRENTICE-BRACE.title: Brace
THEAPPRENTICE-BURDEN.title: Burden
THEAPPRENTICE-BURDEN.description: #Remove up to -2-+3+ negative [gold]Strength[/gold]. Deal 12 damage per [gold]Strength[/gold] removed.
THEAPPRENTICE-ENSEMBLE.title: Ensemble
THEAPPRENTICE-ENSEMBLE.description: #Gain -3-+4+ [gold]Tension[/gold] and -3-+4+ [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each unique debuff active on you.
THEAPPRENTICE-ACCENT.title: Accent
THEAPPRENTICE-ACCENT.description: The next [gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Unweak[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], or [gold]Unvulnerable[/gold] applied to you is doubled.
THEAPPRENTICE-DISCORD.title: Discord
THEAPPRENTICE-DISCORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to yourself.
THEAPPRENTICE-RELEASE.title: Release
THEAPPRENTICE-RELEASE.description: Remove all [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If you removed {IfUpgraded:show:10+|12+} [gold]Block[/gold], deal {IfUpgraded:show:22|18} more.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSFERENCE.title: Transference
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSFERENCE.description: Transfer up to 3 [gold]Weak[/gold] and up to 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to an enemy.{IfUpgraded:show: Draw 1 card.|}
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSFERENCE.selectionProm: Choose an enemy to receive your debuffs.
THEAPPRENTICE-REFLECTION.title: Reflection
THEAPPRENTICE-REFLECTION.description: Remove up to {IfUpgraded:show:5|3} [gold]Weak[/gold]. Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] for each removed.
THEAPPRENTICE-UNBURDENING.title: Unburdening
THEAPPRENTICE-PROJECTION.title: Projection
THEAPPRENTICE-PROJECTION.description: Apply your [gold]Weak[/gold]+1 and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]+1 to ALL enemies.{IfUpgraded:show:| Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold] to yourself.}
THEAPPRENTICE-DEFIANCE.title: Defiance
THEAPPRENTICE-TENACITY.title: Tenacity
THEAPPRENTICE-FORTITUDE.title: Fortitude
THEAPPRENTICE-FORTITUDE.description: #At the start of your turn, if you are [gold]Weak[/gold], gain -3-+5+ [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-UNDERCURRENT.title: Undercurrent
THEAPPRENTICE-UNDERCURRENT.description: #At the end of your turn, if you are [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], deal -8-+12+ damage to ALL enemies.
THEAPPRENTICE-CATHARSIS.title: Catharsis
THEAPPRENTICE-CATHARSIS.description: Remove up to 3 [gold]Weak[/gold] and up to 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. Deal {IfUpgraded:show:10|8} damage to ALL enemies per Weak and Vulnerable removed.
THEAPPRENTICE-TIRADE.title: Tirade
THEAPPRENTICE-TIRADE.description: Remove all [gold]Block[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. If you removed {IfUpgraded:show:12+|15+} [gold]Block[/gold], deal {IfUpgraded:show:25|20} more.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCAPEGOAT.title: Scapegoat
THEAPPRENTICE-SCAPEGOAT.description: Transfer up to 3 [gold]Weak[/gold] and up to 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to {IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies|an enemy}.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCAPEGOAT.selectionPrompt: Choose an enemy to receive your debuffs.
THEAPPRENTICE-RECRIMINATION.title: Recrimination
THEAPPRENTICE-RECRIMINATION.description: At the start of your turn, apply your [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEAPPRENTICE-FERMATA.title: Fermata
THEAPPRENTICE-FERMATA.description: #[gold]Weak[/gold], [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], [gold]Unweak[/gold], and [gold]Unvulnerable[/gold] no longer decrease at the end of your turn.
THEAPPRENTICE-PENANCE.title: Penance
THEAPPRENTICE-FANFARE.title: Fanfare
THEAPPRENTICE-FANFARE.description: #The first time each debuff type is applied to you in combat, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THEAPPRENTICE-DIMINUENDO.title: Diminuendo
THEAPPRENTICE-FLAT.title: Flat
THEAPPRENTICE-SFORZANDO.title: Sforzando
THEAPPRENTICE-STACCATO.title: Staccato
THEAPPRENTICE-BRASS.title: Brass
THEAPPRENTICE-TUTTI.title: Tutti
THEAPPRENTICE-MOTIF.title: Motif
THEAPPRENTICE-STRINGS.title: Strings
THEAPPRENTICE-TREMOLO.title: Tremolo
THEAPPRENTICE-SCORE.title: Score
THEAPPRENTICE-CODA.title: Coda
THEAPPRENTICE-CODA.description: #Remove up to -5-+8+ [gold]Tension[/gold]. Deal damage equal to [gold]Tension[/gold] removed, twice.
THEAPPRENTICE-REPRISE.title: Reprise
THEAPPRENTICE-REPRISE.description: #Deal damage equal to [gold]Tension[/gold] -once-+twice+ to ALL enemies. Remove all [gold]Tension[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-VIBRATO.title: Vibrato
THEAPPRENTICE-VIBRATO.description:
#Deal damage equal to [gold]Tension[/gold]+ twice+.
[gold]Tension[/gold] will NOT be removed this turn.
THEAPPRENTICE-MARCATO.title: Marcato
THEAPPRENTICE-MARCATO.description:
#Deal -3-+4+ damage to a random enemy 4 times.
Gain 5 [gold]Tension[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-BUILDUP.title: Buildup
THEAPPRENTICE-DECEPTIVE_CADENCE.title: Deceptive Cadence
THEAPPRENTICE-DECEPTIVE_CADENCE.descript:
#[gold]Tension[/gold] will NOT deal damage or be removed this turn.
+Gain 1 [gold]Block[/gold] per [gold]Tension[/gold].+
THEAPPRENTICE-DYNAMICS.title: Dynamics
THEAPPRENTICE-DYNAMICS.description: #The next card you play gains -5-+8+ additional [gold]Tension[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-REFRAIN.title: Refrain
THEAPPRENTICE-REFRAIN.description: #Remove up to -5-+8+ [gold]Tension[/gold]. Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to twice the [gold]Tension[/gold] removed.
THEAPPRENTICE-ATTUNEMENT.title: Attunement
THEAPPRENTICE-ATTUNEMENT.description:
#Gain -2-+3+ [gold]Tension[/gold] for each [gold]Dream[/gold] and [gold]Ambition[/gold] in your hand
Draw 1.
THEAPPRENTICE-SUSPENSION.title: Suspension
THEAPPRENTICE-SUSPENSION.description: #At the start of your turn, gain -8-+12+ [gold]Tension[/gold] and -8-+12+ [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-TUNING.title: Tuning
THEAPPRENTICE-CLIMAX.title: Climax
THEAPPRENTICE-CLIMAX.description: #Deal damage equal to [gold]Tension[/gold] -3-+4+ times. Remove all [gold]Tension[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-TRIUMPH.title: Triumph
THEAPPRENTICE-TRIUMPH.description: #Remove up to 15 [gold]Tension[/gold]. Gain -2-+3+ [gold]Block[/gold] and 1 [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each [gold]Tension[/gold] removed.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRAGEDY.title: Tragedy
THEAPPRENTICE-TRAGEDY.description:
#Remove all [gold]Tension[/gold].
Gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to [gold]Tension[/gold] removed.
Apply -3-+5+ [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEAPPRENTICE-FORTISSIMO.title: Fortissimo
THEAPPRENTICE-CADENCE.title: Cadence
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTONE.title: Overtone
THEAPPRENTICE-RESONANCE.title: Resonance
THEAPPRENTICE-RESONANCE.description: #Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Planned[/gold] card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-ELEGY.title: Elegy
THEAPPRENTICE-CADENZA.title: Cadenza
THEAPPRENTICE-BRAVURA.title: Bravura
THEAPPRENTICE-RIPOSTE.title: Riposte
THEAPPRENTICE-PIANISSIMO.title: Pianissimo
THEAPPRENTICE-RALLENTANDO.title: Rallentando
THEAPPRENTICE-TACET.title: Tacet
THEAPPRENTICE-BRIO.title: Brio
THEAPPRENTICE-BRIO.description: Whenever a debuff is applied to you during your turn, gain {IfUpgraded:show:5|3} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-AGITATO.title: Agitato
THEAPPRENTICE-CALANDO.title: Calando
THEAPPRENTICE-STRIKE_B.title: Strike
THEAPPRENTICE-DEFEND_B.title: Defend
THEAPPRENTICE-PERFORMANCE.title: Performance
THEAPPRENTICE-PERFORMANCE.description:
Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards.
Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to up to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills.
THEAPPRENTICE-INTENTION.title: Intention
THEAPPRENTICE-INTENTION.description: Apply [gold]Intense[/gold] to up to {Select:diff()} attacks and skills.
